findings.title: Blog post tags contain language identifiers 'c' and 'rust' — should be in languages field
findings.current: tags: [..., c, rust, ...] — no languages field
findings.expected: Remove c/rust from tags, add languages: [c, rust]

findings.title: Blog post tags contain format words 'tutorial' and 'guide'
findings.expected: Remove — these are contentType not domain tags

findings.title: Blog post tag 'lowlevel' explicitly prohibited by ADR-0005
'book' and 'benchmarking' used as domain tags but are contentType words
findings.expected: Remove book and benchmarking from tags — they describe format not domain

findings.title: deriveCategory maps 'deep-dive-comparing-kernels' to generic 'deep-dive' — loses Kernels grouping
findings.current: Slug doesn't match 'deep-dive-kernels' prefix, falls to catch-all
findings.expected: Add explicit prefix entry returning deep-dive-kernels

findings.title: deriveCategory maps 'deep-dive-llm-observability-*' to generic 'deep-dive'
findings.current: No prefix for deep-dive-llm-observability — unfilterable in Topics
findings.expected: Add prefix mapping to AI/ML category

findings.title: Seven project slugs resolve to generic 'deep-dive' category — unfilterable via Topics
findings.current: elastic-search, tls, ipv6, git-internals, git-as-a-database, heap/stack overflows all get 'deep-dive'
findings.expected: Add to TOPIC_GROUPS as catch-all group, or create specific categories

findings.title: parseRelatedProjects creates edges without checking target node exists — dangling edges
findings.current: edges.push with no nodeIds.has() check — metadata.edgeCount inflated
findings.expected: Build nodeIds set, filter edges against it before deduplication
